verses.1: The king rejoices in your strength, LORD!
verses.2: You have given him his heart’s desire,
verses.3: For you meet him with the blessings of goodness.
verses.4: He asked life of you and you gave it to him,
verses.5: His glory is great in your salvation.
verses.6: For you make him most blessed forever.
verses.7: For the king trusts in the LORD.
verses.8: Your hand will find out all of your enemies.
verses.9: You will make them as a fiery furnace in the time of your anger.
verses.10: You will destroy their descendants from the earth,
verses.11: For they intended evil against you.
verses.12: For you will make them turn their back,
verses.13: Be exalted, LORD, in your strength,
